perception.visual: clear, moving, catching light strangely — visible only by what it does to surfaces
perception.auditory: consistent rush from the tap, changes pitch when cupped in hands
perception.tactile: weightless at first contact, then cold and real — fills the shape of whatever holds it
perception.thermal: cold, then numbing, then absorbed into skin temperature

interpretation.meaning: shapeless until held — it has no form of its own but takes any form given; it disappears and reappears; it is everywhere and ordinary and somehow still not fully understood
